list.name: rom
list.label: Rom
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT current_name(device_id) FROM events WHERE feature = 'temperature' AND state_name = 'temperature' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT last_updated AS "time", 'Frost Hovin' AS metric, (value::text)::float AS temp FROM events WHERE feature = 'weather' AND state_name = 'air_temperature' AND device_id = 'SN18210' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1

SELECT last_updated AS "time", current_name(device_id) AS metric, (value::text)::float AS temp FROM events WHERE feature = 'temperature' AND state_name = 'temperature' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_bin('30 minutes', received_at, TIMESTAMPTZ '2000-01-01') AS "time", 'Netatmo median (<300m)' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (value::text)::float) AS temp FROM events WHERE source = 'netatmo' AND state_name = 'air_temperature' AND COALESCE(substring(device_name from 'Netatmo ([0-9]+)m')::int, 99999) <= 300 AND $__timeFilter(received_at) GROUP BY 1 HAVING count(DISTINCT device_id) >= 3 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_bin('30 minutes', received_at, TIMESTAMPTZ '2000-01-01') AS "time", 'Netatmo p25' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (value::text)::float) AS temp FROM events WHERE source = 'netatmo' AND state_name = 'air_temperature' AND COALESCE(substring(device_name from 'Netatmo ([0-9]+)m')::int, 99999) <= 300 AND $__timeFilter(received_at) GROUP BY 1 HAVING count(DISTINCT device_id) >= 3 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_bin('30 minutes', received_at, TIMESTAMPTZ '2000-01-01') AS "time", 'Netatmo spredning (p25-p75)' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (value::text)::float) AS temp FROM events WHERE source = 'netatmo' AND state_name = 'air_temperature' AND COALESCE(substring(device_name from 'Netatmo ([0-9]+)m')::int, 99999) <= 300 AND $__timeFilter(received_at) GROUP BY 1 HAVING count(DISTINCT device_id) >= 3 ORDER BY 1

SELECT last_updated AS "time", 'Sol (W/m²)' AS metric, (value::text)::float AS v FROM events WHERE feature = 'weather' AND state_name = 'global_radiation' AND device_id = 'SN18700' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1

SELECT last_updated AS "time", 'Vind (m/s)' AS metric, (value::text)::float AS v FROM events WHERE feature = 'weather' AND state_name = 'wind_speed' AND device_id = 'SN18210' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1

SELECT last_updated AS "time", 'Nedbør (mm/t)' AS metric, (value::text)::float AS v FROM events WHERE feature = 'weather' AND state_name = 'precipitation' AND device_id = 'SN18210' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Døgnprofil — $rom: i dag vs. i går, samme dag forrige uke og 7-dagers snitt
panels.description: Samme klokkeslett lagt oppå hverandre på tvers av dager. Les rett opp på ønsket time (f.eks. 18) for å sammenligne i dag mot i går / forrige uke / snittet. Fast vindu (siste 8 døgn) — dette panelet følger IKKE tidsvelgeren øverst.

targets.rawSql: WITH params AS (SELECT (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Oslo')::date AS cur, date_part('hour', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Oslo')::int AS cur_h), readings AS (SELECT (e.last_updated AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Oslo') AS ts, (e.value::text)::float AS temp FROM events e WHERE e.feature = 'temperature' AND e.state_name = 'temperature' AND current_name(e.device_id) = '$rom' AND e.last_updated >= now() - interval '9 days'), grid AS (SELECT gd::date AS d, gh AS h FROM params p, generate_series((p.cur - 8)::timestamp, p.cur::timestamp, interval '1 day') gd, generate_series(0, 23) gh), filled AS (SELECT g.d, g.h, (SELECT r.temp FROM readings r WHERE r.ts < (g.d + make_interval(hours => g.h + 1)) ORDER BY r.ts DESC LIMIT 1) AS temp FROM grid g, params p WHERE NOT (g.d = p.cur AND g.h > p.cur_h)) SELECT f.h AS "Klokkeslett", round(avg(f.temp) FILTER (WHERE f.d = p.cur)::numeric, 1) AS "I dag", round(avg(f.temp) FILTER (WHERE f.d = p.cur - 1)::numeric, 1) AS "I går", round(avg(f.temp) FILTER (WHERE f.d = p.cur - 7)::numeric, 1) AS "For 7 dager siden", round(avg(f.temp) FILTER (WHERE f.d BETWEEN p.cur - 7 AND p.cur - 1)::numeric, 1) AS "7-dagers snitt" FROM filled f CROSS JOIN params p GROUP BY f.h ORDER BY f.h
